title: Only Jugs
body:
![A Minecraft player laying on the side on a hill.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ae09c6c366848eabf5a028ad8db613967b69ae.jpeg)
## About
Only Jugs adds customizable boobs to player models including physics, size-based chestplate armor (depending on the player who made it), a settings screen and multiplayer sync. Villagers now also use the player models and have boobs. Inspired by the Female Gender Mod.

## Gameplay
Besides customizing your character, armor that you craft will have the same chest size fitted for you that your character has. Chestplates from other players or found armor will have different sizes which may or may not fit if they are too small (making you unable to equip them).

## Features
- Choose your size on first join through a settings screen with a live player preview
- Physics that react to walking, jumping, turning, and attacking
- Chestplates keep the chest size of whoever crafted them, shown as a tooltip
- Villagers use player models and have boobs
- Settings sync between players on a server
